calendar.matters:
Mtn By Defts For Order To Vacate & Set Aside Judgmnt, To Recall Any Writ Of Execution, And To File Memo To Set; Declarations In Supp; Memo Of P&A (Proposed) Memo To Set
Off Calendar May-05-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jennifer M. Sike, Esq., Last & Faoro (650) 696-8350 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Luo
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. DEFENDANT FEI TONG and YING WANG'S Motion By Defendants For Order To Vacate And Set Aside Judgment, To Recall Any Writ Of Execution, And To File Memo To Set is OFF CALENDAR. (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Striking Memorandum That Civil Case Is At Issue And Removing Case From Civil Active List
Off Calendar Apr-06-2004 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-05-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-05-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, CSR: Ron Sinclair, Clerk: Marta Vallejo
Appearances:
Dennis L. Faoro, Esq. For Plaintiff: Jim Luo, present, was sworn & examined.
No apperances by defendants: Fei Tong and Ying Wang.
Exhibits:
1- Rental Lease
2- Three day notice
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff: Jim Luo and against the defendants: Fei Tong and Ying Wang
As follows:
Forfeiture of the rental agreement, Restitution of the premises located at: 1370 Marin Street, San francisco, Ca 94124
Back rent of $9,750.00
Hold over damages of $11,520.00
Interest of $81.25
Costs and attorney fees per memo of costs.
Plaintiff attorney to submit judgment for signature.
